title: An Act to Prohibit Indemnification Agreements
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Jan 27, 2026
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
last_senate_action: 1/27/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES in concurrence

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY On OBJECTION of Representative MORRIS of Turner REMOVED . The Committee Report was READ . On motion of Representative MORRIS of Turner the Bill and accompanying papers were COMMITTED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator BAILEY of York the Bill and accompanying papers were COMMITTED to the Committee on Judiciary in concurrence.
Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

amendments.label: C "A" (H-545 )
amendments.new_title: An Act to Prohibit the Transfer of Liability Relating to a Party's Own Negligence or Liability in Contracts
